commit.message:
fix: switch AI from streaming to non-streaming for reliable timeouts

stream().finalMessage() only enforces timeout on the initial HTTP
connection. Once streaming starts (200 OK), the timeout is inactive.
If the stream stalls mid-generation, the request hangs indefinitely.

messages.create() enforces the timeout on the ENTIRE operation — if the
model takes longer than the timeout, it fails immediately and falls to
the next tier.

Also:
- Increased retries from 1 to 2 per tier (5s delay instead of 3s)
- Reduced Sonnet timeout from 130s to 90s (faster fallback to Haiku)
- Added timing logs for production diagnosis
- Created /api/ai/health diagnostic endpoint
- Applied same fix to estimate-editor.ts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: Fix disktest nameserver lookup and IPC wakeup priority

Disktest read reply.data[0] for the service TID, but the nameserver
returns it in reply.tag. Also fix sys_recv wakeup to check pending IPC
messages before IRQ ring — prevents orphaning an IPC message when both
an IPC delivery and IRQ arrive while a task is blocked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(e2e): bypass clerk org creation in test-token endpoint (#3785)

* fix(e2e): bypass clerk org creation in test-token endpoint

The test-token API endpoint fails with HTTP 500 because
createUserScope() calls Clerk's createOrganization() which returns
403 Forbidden for e2e test users. After Neon branch reset the DB is
empty, triggering scope creation that hits the Clerk API.

Replace createUserScope() with a local ensureTestScope() that inserts
scope + scope_member records directly, using a sentinel clerk org ID.
Test scopes don't need a real Clerk Organization.

Also fix generate-test-token.sh:
- Restore stderr for status/error messages (were swallowed by $())
- Restore 5xx retry for transient errors (cold start, connection)
- Show actual HTTP status code in retry messages

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: replace non-null assertion with proper null guard

Replace `fallback!.id` with an explicit null check in
ensureTestScope to comply with strict type-checking rules.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: remove stale clerk organization mock from test-token tests

The production code no longer calls Clerk createOrganization,
so the mock is dead code that could cause confusion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix IPA signing for AltStore: use ad-hoc instead of no-sign

CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO prevents framework embedding, causing
AltStore ServerError2005. Switch to ad-hoc signing (CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY="-")
so Capacitor/Cordova frameworks get properly embedded and AltStore
can re-sign the IPA.

commit.message:
Fix triage escalating valid issues to HITL on empty LLM response (#2072)

* Fix triage escalating valid issues to HITL on empty LLM response

Empty subprocess output was treated as "issue needs more info" instead of
an infrastructure error, causing every triaged issue to land in HITL with
the unhelpful "Could not parse LLM evaluation response" message.

- Raise RuntimeError on empty transcript instead of returning ready=False
- Catch RuntimeError in triage phase so issues stay in find queue for retry
- Log stderr when transcript is empty to surface actual subprocess errors
- Include transcript snippet in parse-failure reasons for debuggability

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix Docker container HOME path to match hydraflow user

Container mounts .claude/.codex/.pi to /root/ but runs as user
hydraflow (uid 1000), causing permission denied on CLI config dirs.
This is why all triage transcripts are 0 bytes — the claude CLI
inside Docker can't read its auth config.

- Change container HOME from /root to /home/hydraflow
- Change mount destinations from /root/.{claude,codex,pi} to
  /home/hydraflow/.{claude,codex,pi}

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Mount .claude.json for Docker auth and detect auth failures

The claude CLI stores OAuth credentials referenced via ~/.claude.json
(separate from ~/.claude/ config dir). Without this file mounted,
Docker containers report "Not logged in" and produce no useful output.

- Mount ~/.claude.json into container at /home/hydraflow/.claude.json
- Detect "authentication_failed" in stream-json output and raise a
  clear RuntimeError instead of silently returning empty transcript
- Add tests for mount presence/absence and auth failure detection

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add CLAUDE_CODE_API_KEY to Docker env passthrough

Supports both ANTHROPIC_API_KEY (API users) and CLAUDE_CODE_API_KEY
(subscription users via `claude setup-token`) for Docker auth.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add Docker execution setup documentation to README

Covers image build, env config, agent auth (Claude setup-token,
API keys, Codex), and supported provider env vars.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix Claude auth env var: CLAUDE_CODE_API_KEY → CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN

The Claude CLI recognizes CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN for setup-token
credentials. Update env passthrough and README docs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Install Codex and Pi CLIs in Docker agent image

Add @openai/codex and @mariozechner/pi-coding-agent to the npm
install in Dockerfile.agent so all three agent backends are
available in containers. Update smoke test to verify.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix Codex and Pi CLI symlinks in Docker image

npm install creates thin Node.js wrapper scripts in /usr/bin/ that
rely on module resolution back to /usr/lib/node_modules/. COPY
flattens these into regular files that lose resolution context.
Use proper symlinks to the package bin entry points instead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

docs: explain why SKILL.md path is used instead of Skill() for sub-agents

Sub-agents spawned via the Task tool start with a fresh context.
Skill() loads content into the current conversation, but a sub-agent
needs instructions embedded in its prompt. Added a Why comment block
in execute-planning, execute-task, and execute-task-direct to make
this design decision explicit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: add stable instanceId to WorkoutExercise, move Add Exercise button below list

Exercise deletion after creating supersets left visible gaps because
deriveGroups() used array-index-based keys (solo-0, solo-1...) that
shift on deletion, causing React key collisions and stale Framer Motion
animation state. Added instanceId (crypto.randomUUID()) to every
WorkoutExercise at creation time (addExercise, addExerciseToGroup,
loadTemplate, parseImport) with hydration backfill for persisted data.
deriveGroups() now uses solo-${instanceId} for stable keys.

Also moved the "Add Exercise" button from above the WorkoutList to below
it and removed redundant inline "+" buttons between groups.

commit.message:
refactor: replace all bare simp calls with simp only across codebase (#607)

Replace 51 bare `simp` tactic calls with targeted `simp only [...]`
variants using `simp?`-generated lemma sets. This makes proofs robust
against changes to the default simp lemma set (important for toolchain
bumps).

Files changed:
- ZipForStd/List.lean (9 instances)
- Zip/Spec/DeflateEncodeDynamicProps.lean (23 instances, including
  the known residual at line 26)
- Zip/Spec/InflateCorrect.lean (11 instances)
- Zip/Spec/HuffmanKraft.lean (4 instances)
- Zip/Spec/DeflateEncodeDynamic.lean (4 instances)
- Zip/Spec/DeflateDynamicHeader.lean (2 instances)
- Zip/Spec/ZlibCorrect.lean (1 instance)

Closes #601

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix eligibility cards to equal height

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: nginx always serves fresh index.html — prevents stale chunk 404s

location / now sends Cache-Control: no-store for all responses including
the try_files /index.html fallback (SPA routes). Previously the fallback
bypassed the location = /index.html block's no-cache headers, so browsers
cached old index.html referencing stale chunk hashes after deploys.

Hashed /assets/*.js|css still get immutable long-term cache (content-addressed).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: v1.7.0 — Complete historical country names for all eras

Every country in the world now shows its historically correct name
and exists only during the years it actually existed.

New historical country forms (WorldCountriesDatabase):
- Ottoman Empire (replaces Turkey pre-1923)
- Persia (replaces Iran pre-1935)
- Siam (replaces Thailand pre-1939)
- Feudal Japan (pre-1868) and Empire of Japan (1868-1945)
- Joseon Korea (pre-1897), Korean Empire (1897-1910)
  Japanese Korea (1910-1945): removed from map
- Qing Empire (replaces China pre-1912)
- British India (1858-1947), Mughal Empire (pre-1858)
- Dutch East Indies (replaces Indonesia pre-1945/1949)
- British Burma (replaces Myanmar pre-1948)
- Spanish Philippines (pre-1898), US Territory (1898-1946)
- Federation of Malaya (1957-1963)
- Italian States (replaces Italy pre-1861)
- Iraq Mandate (British, 1920-1932)
- Syria Mandate (French, 1920-1946)

Countries removed before their founding:
Belgium (1830), Norway (1905), Finland (1917), Iceland (1944),
Ireland (1922), Poland (1918), Hungary/Czech/Slovak (1918),
Romania (1881), Bulgaria (1908), Greece (1829), Albania (1912),
Australia (1901), New Zealand (1907), Canada (1867),
Mexico (1821), Central America (1821), South America (1821),
Brazil (1822), Caribbean islands (various dates),
Cambodia (1953), Laos (1954), Malaysia (1957), Mongolia (1921),
Papua New Guinea (1975), South Africa (1910), Libya (1951),
Korea (absorbed by Japan 1910-1945), and more.

Name changes in adjustCountriesForEra (GameState):
- Myanmar → "Burma" pre-1989
- Vietnam → "French Indochina" pre-1954
- Egypt → "British Egypt" (pre-1922), "Kingdom of Egypt" (1922-1953)
- Ethiopia → "Abyssinia" (pre-1975), "Italian East Africa" (1936-1941)
- Sudan → "Anglo-Egyptian Sudan" (pre-1956)
- Morocco → "French Morocco" (1912-1956)
- Algeria → "French Algeria" (1830-1962)
- Tunisia → "French Tunisia" (1881-1956)
- Congo DRC → "Belgian Congo" (pre-1960)
- Zimbabwe → "Southern Rhodesia" (pre-1965), "Rhodesia" (1965-1980)
- Namibia → "South West Africa" (pre-1990)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
